name: Verify G+ (General Ability) - Interactive
description: Adaptive general cognitive ability test measuring numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning in an interactive format. Provides a single overall ability score.

name: Verify G+ (General Ability) - Standard
description: General cognitive ability test combining numerical, verbal, and inductive reasoning subtests. Provides a single overall ability score for screening.

name: Verify Interactive - Numerical Reasoning
description: Adaptive numerical reasoning test using interactive item types. Measures ability to interpret and analyze numerical data, tables, charts, and graphs.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning
description: Classic numerical reasoning test measuring the ability to make correct decisions or inferences from numerical data. Suitable for graduate and professional roles.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning 1.0
description: Version 1.0 of the numerical reasoning test. Assesses ability to work with numerical data, percentages, ratios, and data tables.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning 2.0
description: Version 2.0 of the numerical reasoning test with updated item bank. Measures interpretation of charts, graphs, percentages, and financial data.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning - Short Form
description: Shortened numerical reasoning assessment for rapid screening. Provides quick measurement of numerical data interpretation skills.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning - Graduate
description: Graduate-level numerical reasoning test with higher complexity items targeting university graduate and professional-level candidates.

name: Verify Numerical Reasoning - Management
description: Management-level numerical reasoning test with complex business scenarios requiring advanced numerical data interpretation.

name: Verify Interactive - Verbal Reasoning
description: Adaptive verbal reasoning test using interactive item types. Measures ability to evaluate written information, draw logical conclusions, and assess arguments.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning
description: Classic verbal reasoning test measuring the ability to understand and evaluate written passages, make inferences, and assess logical arguments.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning 1.0
description: Version 1.0 of the verbal reasoning test assessing reading comprehension, logical deduction from text, and evaluating written arguments.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning 2.0
description: Version 2.0 of the verbal reasoning test with refreshed item bank. Evaluates comprehension, logical evaluation, and inference from written material.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning - Short Form
description: Shortened verbal reasoning test for efficient candidate screening. Measures core verbal comprehension and logical evaluation skills.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning - Graduate
description: Graduate-level verbal reasoning test with complex passages and sophisticated argument evaluation for university graduate and professional hires.

name: Verify Verbal Reasoning - Management
description: Management-level verbal reasoning test featuring complex business, policy, and strategic text passages for senior-level assessment.

name: Verify Interactive - Inductive Reasoning
description: Adaptive inductive reasoning test using interactive item types. Measures ability to identify patterns, rules, and trends in abstract visual information.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning
description: Classic inductive reasoning test measuring the ability to draw inferences and understand relationships between abstract concepts and patterns.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning 1.0

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning 2.0
description: Version 2.0 of the inductive reasoning test with updated item bank. Measures abstract reasoning and pattern recognition.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning - Short Form
description: Shortened inductive reasoning assessment for rapid screening. Quick measure of abstract pattern recognition and logical thinking.

name: Verify Inductive Reasoning - Graduate

name: Verify Deductive Reasoning

name: Verify Verbal Comprehension
description: Measures ability to understand and evaluate written information at operational and clerical levels.
